economic_notes: Band has partnership interests in several limited partnerships, membership in three societies and shareholdings in ten companies. Key investments include Coast Tsimshian Resources LP, Lax Kw'alaams Fishing Enterprises LP, Lax Kw'alaams Business Development LP, Lax Kw'alaams Holdings LP, and Lax Kw'alaams (MV Nucleus) LLP. Committed $5,000,000 contribution towards housing construction through Lax Kw'alaams WAAP Society. Guarantor on various loans totalling approximately $6,346,568.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-recognition of Asset Retirement Obligations (ARO) as required under PS 3280. Interfund administration and rent charges of $3,692,155 have NOT been eliminated for consolidation purposes, which is unusual. Investments in five limited partnerships totalling $41,748,454 recorded using modified equity method. Accumulated surplus per statement of financial activities ($161,976,689) differs from sum of departmental surpluses in Note 11 ($37,151,809) plus equity in property and equipment ($81,485,378) plus Ottawa Trust funds ($1,591,048) plus investments ($41,748,454) suggesting additional components. Revenue in 2023 was significantly higher ($62.7M vs $48.1M in 2024) largely due to ISC funding drop from $38M to $17.9M. Capital Development expenditures were $35.4M budgeted vs only $4.1M actual.
